meta.title: 消费者权益保护
meta.description: Upper-intermediate consumer rights protection vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: fraud, returns, and rights advocacy.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 중급~중상급 소비자 권익 보호 어휘와 문형: 사기, 반품, 권리 주장.

questions.prompt: 「消费者权益」是什么意思？(What does 消费者权益 mean?)

explanation.en: 「假冒伪劣」(jiǎmào wěiliè) means "counterfeit and shoddy [goods]".

questions.prompt: 「假冒伪劣」是什么意思？(What does 假冒伪劣 mean?)
「维权」是什么意思？(What does 维权 mean?)

explanation.en: 「退换货」(tuìhuànhuò) means "to return or exchange goods".

questions.prompt: 「退换货」是什么意思？(What does 退换货 mean?)
choices: 退换货(to return or exchange goods)

questions.prompt: 「欺诈行为」是什么意思？(What does 欺诈行为 mean?)
《消费者权益保护法》明确规定了保护___的具体措施。(The Consumer Rights Protection Law clearly stipulates specific measures for protecting consumer rights.)
市场上存在一些___商品，消费者购买时要格外小心。(There are some counterfeit and shoddy products on the market, consumers must be extra careful when purchasing.)
消费者权益受到侵害后，可以通过法律途径___。(After consumer rights are infringed, one can protect one's rights through legal channels.)
这件商品有质量问题，我想申请___。(This item has a quality issue, I want to apply for a return or exchange.)
这家公司的虚假宣传属于___，已经被消费者协会调查。(This company's false advertising constitutes fraudulent behavior, has already been investigated by the consumer association.)
尽管有相关法律保护，___消费者维权依然面临不少困难。(Although there are relevant laws for protection, consumer rights protection still faces many difficulties.)
无论线上还是线下购物，消费者___应该保留好购物凭证。(Whether shopping online or offline, consumers should always keep purchase receipts.)
除非商家主动承担责任，___消费者往往需要通过投诉来维权。(Unless merchants proactively take responsibility, consumers often need to complain to protect their rights.)
这家企业之所以受到消费者信赖，___是因为始终坚持诚信经营。(This enterprise is trusted by consumers precisely because it has always adhered to honest business practices.)

explanation.en: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」means "on one hand 〜, on the other hand 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」는 '한편으로는 ~, 다른 한편으로는 ~'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一方面消费者要提高维权意识，___方面政府也要加强市场监管。(On one hand consumers need to raise their awareness of rights protection, on the other hand the government also needs to strengthen market supervision.)
消费者权益保护协会___了很多起消费欺诈案件。(The consumer rights protection association exposed many cases of consumer fraud.)
购买商品前，仔细阅读产品说明可以有效___消费风险。(Before buying products, carefully reading product descriptions can effectively reduce consumption risks.)
这个平台___了完善的售后服务体系，保障消费者权益。(This platform established a comprehensive after-sales service system, safeguarding consumer rights.)
这起消费纠纷最终通过___得到了圆满解决。(This consumer dispute was ultimately resolved satisfactorily through mediation.)
消费者在网购时应该选择___的平台，避免上当受骗。(Consumers should choose reputable platforms when shopping online, avoiding being deceived.)

explanation.en: The modifying phrase 保护消费者权益的 (for protecting consumer rights) must come before the noun 具体措施 (specific measures): 保护消费者权益的具体措施 (not 具体措施保护消费者权益的).
explanation.ko: 수식구 '保护消费者权益的'는 명사 '具体措施' 앞에 와야 하므로 '保护消费者权益的具体措施'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 《消费者权益保护法》明确规定了具体措施保护消费者权益的。(The Consumer Rights Protection Law clearly stipulates specific measures for protecting consumer rights.) — find the error
choices: 《消费者权益保护法》明确规定了保护消费者权益的具体措施。
《消费者权益保护法》明确规定了具体措施保护消费者权益的。
《消费者权益保护法》明确规定了保护具体措施消费者权益的。
《消费者权益保护法》明确规定了消费者权益保护的具体措施。

explanation.en: 「都」must come before 应该 (should): 都应该 (not 应该都).
explanation.ko: 「都」는 '应该' 앞에 와야 하므로 '都应该'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 无论线上还是线下购物，消费者应该都保留好购物凭证。(Whether shopping online or offline, consumers should always keep purchase receipts.) — find the error
choices: 无论线上还是线下购物，消费者都应该保留好购物凭证。
无论线上还是线下购物，消费者应该都保留好购物凭证。
无论线上还是线下购物，都消费者应该保留好购物凭证。
无论线上还是线下购物，消费者保留都应该好购物凭证。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这家企业之所以受到消费者信赖，因为是始终坚持诚信经营。(This enterprise is trusted by consumers precisely because it has always adhered to honest business practices.) — find the error
choices: 这家企业之所以受到消费者信赖，是因为始终坚持诚信经营。
这家企业之所以受到消费者信赖，因为是始终坚持诚信经营。
这家企业之所以受到消费者信赖，是始终因为坚持诚信经营。
这家企业之所以受到消费者信赖，始终是因为坚持诚信经营。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 《消费者权益保护法》明确规定了保护消费者权益的具体措施 ("The Consumer Rights Protection Law clearly stipulates specific measures for protecting consumer rights").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '《消费者权益保护法》明确规定了保护消费者权益的具体措施' (소비자권익보호법은 소비자 권익 보호를 위한 구체적인 조치를 명확히 규정하고 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 《消费者权益保护法》明确规定了__________。(The Consumer Rights Protection Law clearly stipulates specific measures for protecting consumer rights.)
words: 保护消费者权益的具体措施
questions.answer: 保护消费者权益的具体措施

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 无论线上还是线下购物，消费者都应该保留好购物凭证 ("Whether shopping online or offline, consumers should always keep purchase receipts").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '无论线上还是线下购物，消费者都应该保留好购物凭证' (온라인이든 오프라인 쇼핑이든 소비자는 항상 구매 증빙을 잘 보관해야 한다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 无论线上还是线下购物，消费者__________保留好购物凭证。(Whether shopping online or offline, consumers should always keep purchase receipts.)
